# Ezequiel Fernández | Full Stack Developer

> Personal portfolio and professional site. Static site, no backend. Built with React 19, TypeScript 5.9, Vite 7, Tailwind CSS 4, DaisyUI 5.

## About

Full Stack Developer specializing in accessible architecture, REST APIs, and high-performance interfaces. Main stack: React 19, TypeScript 5.9, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma.

## Skills

- **Frontend**: React 19, TypeScript 5.9 (strict), Vite 7, Tailwind CSS 4, DaisyUI 5, React Router 7, TanStack Query, Zod 4, react-hook-form
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, Supabase
- **Testing**: Vitest 4, React Testing Library, Playwright
- **DevOps**: Vercel, GitHub Actions, CI/CD (lint + type-check + test + deploy)
- **Architecture**: Clean Architecture, Screaming Architecture, DDD-lite, Feature Slices, Repository Pattern
- **Tools**: Git, ESLint 9 (flat config), Prettier, pnpm 11, Commander (CLI)
- **GEO/SEO**: Generative Engine Optimization, AI crawler configuration, schema.org JSON-LD, llms.txt, sitemap automation

## Certifications

- **AI Skills Fest 2026** (Microsoft) — AI-powered development with GitHub Copilot, advanced prompt engineering, and AI-first workflows. [Credly badge](https://www.credly.com/badges/6f6e4c5f-1d80-4a63-8f1b-3a4a7c6b9e2d)

## Projects

- [EchoLog](https://github.com/ezefernandezyf/echolog) — Multi-tenant customer feedback SaaS. Boards, voting, comments, workspace management. Full-stack TypeScript with React 19, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL.
- [Nexus Talent](https://github.com/ezefernandezyf/nexus-talent) — AI-assisted recruitment platform that transforms raw job descriptions into structured skill matrices and technical application strategies.
- [geo-seo-opencode](https://github.com/ezefernandezyf/geo-seo-opencode) — Open-source GEO toolkit for opencode. 16 analysis skills for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini. Cross-platform, one-command installer. CLI toolkit for AI search optimization.
- [Movie Management Dashboard](https://github.com/ezefernandezyf/movie-dashboard) — SPA dashboard for movie catalog management. CRUD, Supabase authentication, React Query, modular architecture.
- [CineLab](https://github.com/ezefernandezyf/cinelab) — Movie Search App with TMDB API. Search, filters, persistent favorites, dynamic recommendations.
- [ChefcitoIA](https://github.com/ezefernandezyf/ia-recipe-generator) — AI recipe generator. Integration with AI APIs, error handling with AbortController, Zod validation.

## Site Structure

| Route | Description | Lang |
|-------|-------------|------|
| `/home` | Home | ES |
| `/en/home` | Home | EN |
| `/about` | About me | ES |
| `/en/about` | About me | EN |
| `/projects` | Projects directory | ES |
| `/en/projects` | Projects directory | EN |
| `/projects/cinelab` | CineLab case study | ES |
| `/en/projects/cinelab` | CineLab case study | EN |
| `/projects/movie-dashboard` | Movie Dashboard case study | ES |
| `/en/projects/movie-dashboard` | Movie Dashboard case study | EN |
| `/projects/chefcitoia` | ChefcitoIA case study | ES |
| `/en/projects/chefcitoia` | ChefcitoIA case study | EN |
| `/projects/nexus-talent` | Nexus Talent case study | ES |
| `/en/projects/nexus-talent` | Nexus Talent case study | EN |
| `/projects/echolog` | EchoLog case study | ES |
| `/en/projects/echolog` | EchoLog case study | EN |
| `/projects/geo-seo-opencode` | geo-seo-opencode case study | ES |
| `/en/projects/geo-seo-opencode` | geo-seo-opencode case study | EN |
| `/contact` | Contact form | ES |
| `/en/contact` | Contact form | EN |
| `/privacy` | Privacy policy | ES |
| `/en/privacy` | Privacy policy | EN |
| `/not-found` | 404 page | ES |
| `/en/not-found` | 404 page | EN |
